name: ORCID Suggestions
description: Discovers missing ORCID identifiers for persons via the ORCID Public API.

status_labels.completed_with_results: ORCID discovery completed: {count} new suggestion(s) found.
status_labels.completed_empty: ORCID discovery completed: No new suggestions found.
status_labels.already_running: An ORCID discovery job is already running.

empty_state.title: No pending ORCID suggestions
empty_state.description: No new ORCID matches found. Click "Check" to search again.
